title: ActiveCampaign vs Customer.io (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: ActiveCampaign vs Customer.io: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between ActiveCampaign and Customer.io comes down to your specific use case. ActiveCampaign is built for businesses needing advanced automation and CRM, while Customer.io targets product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages.

comparison_table.tool_a: Businesses Needing Advanced Automation And Crm
comparison_table.tool_b: Product And Growth Teams Sending Behaviour-Triggered Messages

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages

faq.a: It depends on your use case. ActiveCampaign wins for businesses needing advanced automation and CRM, while Customer.io is stronger for product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or Customer.io?
faq.a: ActiveCampaign starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Customer.io to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
